Subject: NCM-P-2025-05-08 Home in Five Platinum Funds Available 05.09.2025
From: Product Department <ProductDept@novahomeloans.com>
Date: 2025-05-08 13:45:42-07:00



ANNOUNCEMENT SUMMARY

 

eHousing has announced the availability of funds for the Home in Five Platinum program fund allocation for 2025.  See their announcement below for details:

$75 Million of Home in 5 Platinum Program funds will be available tomorrow, May 9th, at a mortgage rate of 6.09%, coupled with down payment assistance of 4%!

Click here to view the Home in 5 Platinum web page on the eHousingPlus web site <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sEmX0HUaZ2cI3dFBJYh1MXU8gtjnZCITgDYettbj6t35RvZwFxglMNKtissRoJOiCm5ibf9cfOn2WjS0bResjEuDbqFZX-z6Owzr0wQ-2MNL7k7AW40I0kP79Fg5pEFe51L-Oq_1s1h6cnh2JC4Gs43_ZM7p3HRSRk7k5YrjNBda-DDv_mh7rryyWq3Q9aQT&c=ncySwMAtwAfX0IxoiqYM7fbWtdoGzSuNJwTytl5r-NMelbNlLDnhLw==&ch=Ai_v-dkKvMqV79F3stMPvQVFgpaaRUCYhHSKhHLyE6Ue4QztaZBlqw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!Qcc4A1HtF1rh-jU-00bKDjHrfmgi6HyvOA9VQHJ_Zx-uDDsDuinHwf2nYTCxtHcdNHdVMFEkK8_aMm5jDDmRiglSjA$> 

Where can I find the rate for the Home in 5 Platinum Program? Reservation/Rate Locks are available Monday - Friday 9:00AM - 7:00PM MT excluding holidays. 

Where can I find income calculation guidance? Pages 22 - 26 of the Program Guidelines found on the Home in 5 Platinum web page <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sEmX0HUaZ2cI3dFBJYh1MXU8gtjnZCITgDYettbj6t35RvZwFxglMNKtissRoJOiCm5ibf9cfOn2WjS0bResjEuDbqFZX-z6Owzr0wQ-2MNL7k7AW40I0kP79Fg5pEFe51L-Oq_1s1h6cnh2JC4Gs43_ZM7p3HRSRk7k5YrjNBfb109heQFYrVUNuZWDYt4J&c=ncySwMAtwAfX0IxoiqYM7fbWtdoGzSuNJwTytl5r-NMelbNlLDnhLw==&ch=Ai_v-dkKvMqV79F3stMPvQVFgpaaRUCYhHSKhHLyE6Ue4QztaZBlqw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!Qcc4A1HtF1rh-jU-00bKDjHrfmgi6HyvOA9VQHJ_Zx-uDDsDuinHwf2nYTCxtHcdNHdVMFEkK8_aMm5jDDkv6xJ8MQ$>  > click on the Owl Program Administration Guidelines.

Where can I find the income and purchase price limits? Program Highlights web page. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sEmX0HUaZ2cI3dFBJYh1MXU8gtjnZCITgDYettbj6t35RvZwFxglMNKtissRoJOidw8upChDgg68nBAO5fphJr6KUUScaF0ukinEuScaG0dDN51IvpSNlBaZGBt12M1zc5XyBR3OnnhSe5_M092HW44dm9gBlRxL_Y53A9CE2RTTXWPWJFv_9cckhmi3GRNPunZqZ-dAWHMxL21h1STqeGnW4F3_9Agk&c=ncySwMAtwAfX0IxoiqYM7fbWtdoGzSuNJwTytl5r-NMelbNlLDnhLw==&ch=Ai_v-dkKvMqV79F3stMPvQVFgpaaRUCYhHSKhHLyE6Ue4QztaZBlqw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!Qcc4A1HtF1rh-jU-00bKDjHrfmgi6HyvOA9VQHJ_Zx-uDDsDuinHwf2nYTCxtHcdNHdVMFEkK8_aMm5jDDnNPcoOhw$>  > click on the 2025B Bond Guide > pages 9 and 10.

I have a colleague that needs training, how can they attend training? eHPUniversity provides training on-demand. Click on this link to register. <https://urldefense.com/v3/__https:/gvb7kqsab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sEmX0HUaZ2cI3dFBJYh1MXU8gtjnZCITgDYettbj6t35RvZwFxglMK5q0WjRDGSXQB16G8_8EgRaF1WHpl_MLILOQZV3zwC2a5t81kd3Xg8qU3Ba5o4ilAWwJ7XFRpDeosIjNdFqveFq0UQ0LkyzAS-fKTFZSsUn&c=ncySwMAtwAfX0IxoiqYM7fbWtdoGzSuNJwTytl5r-NMelbNlLDnhLw==&ch=Ai_v-dkKvMqV79F3stMPvQVFgpaaRUCYhHSKhHLyE6Ue4QztaZBlqw==__;!!L9-43RkOeiO9WQ!Qcc4A1HtF1rh-jU-00bKDjHrfmgi6HyvOA9VQHJ_Zx-uDDsDuinHwf2nYTCxtHcdNHdVMFEkK8_aMm5jDDnr0sCQ6w$>  

FOR MORE INFORMATION… 

*	For Underwriting inquiries, contact Jumbo Underwriting <mailto:jumbodelegatedunderwriting@novahomeloans.com>  
*	For Product inquiries, contact Product <mailto:Productdept@novahomeloans.com> 
*	For Pricing inquiries, contact Lock Desk <mailto:lock.desk@novahomeloans.com> 

** For NOVA Home Loans Internal Distribution Only **

To find additional information, follow this path: NOVANet > Capital Markets <https://novahomeloans.sharepoint.com/sites/Home/SitePages/Capital-Markets.aspx>
